name: domaincheckr
description: Check domain name availability instantly. Supports single checks, bulk checks, and smart suggestions. No API key or installation required.

tools.name: check_domain
tools.description: Check if a single domain name is available for registration

tools.name: check_domains_bulk
tools.description: Check up to 50 domain names at once

tools.name: suggest_domains
tools.description: Generate and check domain name ideas for a keyword or business description
